meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a tall glass of purple kefir smoothie beside two fried eggs on toasted sourdough slices, fresh blueberries scattered on a white plate, natural morning light, appetising
day_of_steps: Pour 250 ml kefir into a blender, add 1/2 medium banana and 80 g blueberries, blend 30 seconds until smooth. Pour into a tall glass.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Crack eggs into pan. For Diego: 3 eggs; for Diana: 2 eggs. Fry 2–3 min until whites are set but yolk still soft.
Toast 40 g sourdough (Diego) / 30 g sourdough (Diana) in toaster.
Plate eggs on toast, season with black pepper and a pinch of sea salt. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a crisp green apple sliced on a small wooden board beside a small bowl of whole almonds, soft natural light, clean minimalist styling
day_of_steps: Rinse and slice 1 apple. Weigh out almonds. Enjoy immediately.

meals.name: Mexican Beef & Lentil Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Corn Tortillas & Lime
meals.image_prompt: overhead shot of a colourful Mexican bowl with seasoned ground beef, green lentils, roasted red and yellow peppers, shredded spinach, two corn tortillas on the side, lime wedge, light wooden table, vibrant natural light
prep_steps: Brown 700 g ground beef with cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper and tomato paste on Sunday. Cool and refrigerate (batch_beef_monday).
Roast sliced red and yellow bell peppers with olive oil, oregano, black pepper on Sunday. Refrigerate (batch_roasted_peppers).
Drain and rinse 2 cans lentils, portion into containers. Refrigerate (batch_lentils).
day_of_steps: Reheat Diego's 200 g beef and Diana's 130 g beef in a pan over medium heat 3–4 min.
Reheat portions of roasted peppers (Diego 150 g, Diana 100 g) in the same pan 2 min.
Warm 2 corn tortillas per person in a dry pan 1 min each side.
Spoon cold lentils (Diego 80 g, Diana 60 g) into bowl — no need to reheat.
Layer spinach (Diego 40 g, Diana 30 g) at the bottom of bowl first, then lentils, then beef and peppers.
Drizzle 2 tsp olive oil over Diego's bowl, 1 tsp over Diana's. Squeeze lime juice on top.
Serve tortillas alongside. Accompany with 1 cup of strawberries per person.

ingredients.item: Cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, tomato paste
Cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, garlic powder, tomato paste

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: a small bowl of thick white Greek yogurt topped with halved fresh strawberries and walnut pieces, natural side light, clean white background
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl (Diego 180 g, Diana 130 g).
Top with rinsed strawberries (Diego 80 g, Diana 60 g) and walnuts (Diego 20 g, Diana 15 g).

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Garlic-Lemon Spinach & Sweet Potato Wedges
meals.image_prompt: plated baked salmon fillet with golden crust beside wilted garlicky spinach and roasted orange sweet potato wedges, drizzled with olive oil, white ceramic plate, warm evening light
prep_steps: On Sunday, par-roast sweet potato wedges (tossed in olive oil, smoked paprika, sea salt) at 200°C for 20 min. Cool and refrigerate (batch_sweet_potato).
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Place salmon fillets on a lined baking tray. Season with olive oil, garlic powder, dried oregano, black pepper and a squeeze of lime. Diego: 180 g fillet; Diana: 130 g fillet.
Add refrigerated sweet potato wedges to the tray alongside salmon (Diego 150 g, Diana 100 g).
Bake 14–16 min until salmon is opaque and flakes easily.
While salmon bakes, heat 1 tsp olive oil in a pan, add minced garlic (1 clove), add spinach (Diego 80 g, Diana 60 g), sauté 3 min until wilted. Season with black pepper.
Plate spinach first, then salmon on top, sweet potato wedges on side.
Serve with cherry tomatoes (Diego 80 g, Diana 60 g) on the side.

ingredients.item: Garlic powder, dried oregano, black pepper, lime juice
Garlic powder, dried oregano, black pepper, lime juice

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Strawberries & Banana + Fried Eggs on Sourdough with Feta
meals.image_prompt: pink strawberry kefir smoothie in a tall glass next to two fried eggs on sourdough toast topped with crumbled white feta, fresh strawberries on the side, bright morning natural light
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 100 g strawberries and 1/2 banana (60 g) until smooth. Pour into glass.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan over medium heat. Fry eggs (Diego: 3, Diana: 2) 2–3 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g).
Plate eggs on toast, crumble feta on top (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g). Season with black pepper.

meals.name: Orange & Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: peeled orange segments arranged on a small white plate next to a handful of green pistachios in a small ceramic bowl, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Peel and segment 1 orange per person. Weigh out pistachios (Diego: 25 g, Diana: 15 g). Enjoy.

meals.name: Asian Sesame Tilapia Bowl with Stir-Fried Zucchini, Carrots & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: overhead of a white bowl with pan-seared tilapia, julienned stir-fried zucchini and carrots, brown rice, drizzled with sesame soy glaze and sesame seeds, chopsticks alongside, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice according to packet (boil 25 min). Diego: 70 g dry; Diana: 50 g dry. Drain.
Season tilapia fillets with ginger powder, garlic powder, soy sauce, black pepper. Diego: 180 g; Diana: 130 g.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a pan, cook tilapia 3–4 min per side until cooked through. Set aside.

In same pan, add 1 tsp sesame oil, stir-fry sliced zucchini (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) and julienned carrots (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) with a splash of soy sauce and a pinch of ginger powder, 4–5 min.
Plate rice first, then vegetables, then tilapia on top.
Drizzle a few drops of balsamic vinegar over rice for glucose management.
Serve with a small bowl of blueberries (80 g each) on the side.

ingredients.item: Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper
Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper

meals.name: Apple with Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: sliced red apple on a small plate beside a neat pile of walnut halves, soft natural light, minimalist styling
day_of_steps: Rinse and slice apple. Weigh walnuts (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g). Serve on a plate.

meals.name: Creamy Tomato Chicken Thighs with Wilted Spinach & Wholemeal Penne
meals.prep_ahead: Marinate chicken thighs in garlic, olive oil and herbs the night before.
meals.image_prompt: Creamy tomato chicken thighs over wholemeal penne with wilted spinach, garnished with fresh basil
prep_steps: Marinate chicken thighs in garlic, olive oil, and dried herbs.
Cook wholemeal penne according to package instructions.
day_of_steps: Sear chicken thighs in a pan until golden.
Add crushed tomatoes, garlic, and a splash of cream; simmer 15 min.
Stir in spinach until wilted.
Serve over drained penne.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Blueberries & Orange + Boiled Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a tall glass of deep blue-purple kefir smoothie beside two halved hard-boiled eggs on toasted sourdough, orange slices fanned out on white plate, bright morning window light
prep_steps: Hard-boil 10 eggs on Sunday (boil 9 min, ice bath, peel, refrigerate in airtight container). Safe through Thursday.
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 80 g blueberries and juice of 1/2 orange until smooth. Pour into glass.
Retrieve 2 pre-boiled eggs per person from fridge. Halve and season with sea salt and black pepper.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g).
Plate eggs on toast. Peel and slice remaining 1/2 orange to serve alongside.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: small white bowl of thick Greek yogurt scattered with fresh blueberries and slivered almonds, soft natural light from the left
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt into bowl (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g). Top with blueberries (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and almonds (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g).

meals.name: French-Style Beef & Leek Pasta with Wholemeal Penne & Spinach
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a white bowl of wholemeal penne pasta tossed with seasoned ground beef, sautéed leeks, wilted spinach and a rustic tomato herb sauce, parmesan shavings optional, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Boil a large pot of salted water. Cook wholemeal penne (Diego: 75 g dry, Diana: 55 g dry) 10–12 min until al dente. Reserve 50 ml pasta water before draining.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tsp olive oil in a wide pan. Add sliced leek (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and sauté 4 min until softened.
Add ground beef (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 120 g), break up and cook 5 min until browned. Season with dried thyme, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper.
Stir in 2 tbsp tomato paste and splash of reserved pasta water. Simmer 3 min.
Add spinach (Diego: 60 g, Diana: 40 g), stir until wilted.
Toss drained pasta into pan with sauce. Plate and drizzle 1 tsp olive oil.
Serve with lentils on the side (Diego: 60 g drained, Diana: 40 g drained) — no reheat needed.
Follow with a small bowl of strawberries (80 g each) for dessert.

ingredients.item: Dried thyme, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper
Dried thyme, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper

meals.name: Apple & Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: green apple wedges on a small wooden board with pistachios in a white ceramic ramekin, natural light, clean styling
day_of_steps: Slice apple and weigh pistachios (Diego: 25 g, Diana: 15 g). Plate and serve.

meals.name: Tilapia Tacos with Roasted Bell Peppers, Spinach & Lime in Corn Tortillas
meals.image_prompt: two corn tortillas filled with flaked pan-seared tilapia, roasted red and yellow bell peppers, green spinach, drizzled with a mustard-lime sauce, served on a colourful ceramic plate, bright natural light from above
prep_steps: On Sunday roast sliced bell peppers (batch_roasted_peppers) — use leftovers for Wednesday dinner.
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of fish seafood only keeps ~2 day(s), and this is day 3. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Season tilapia (Diego: 160 g, Diana: 110 g) with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper and a squeeze of lime.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in pan, cook tilapia 3–4 min per side until cooked through. Flake with a fork.
Warm corn tortillas (Diego: 3, Diana: 2) in a dry pan 30 sec each.
Reheat roasted bell peppers (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) briefly in pan.
Mix 1 tsp mustard + 1 tsp lime juice + pinch of cumin as taco sauce.
Assemble tacos: lay spinach first (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g), then peppers, then flaked tilapia, drizzle mustard-lime sauce.
Serve with carrot sticks on the side (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and 80 g blueberries each.

ingredients.item: Cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper
Cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper

meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of fish seafood only keeps ~2 day(s), and this is day 3. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Strawberries + Boiled Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: creamy pink-orange kefir smoothie in a glass jar beside halved hard-boiled eggs on thick sourdough toast, whole strawberries scattered around, warm morning light
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana (60 g) and 80 g strawberries. Pour into glass.
Retrieve 2 pre-boiled eggs from fridge (from Sunday batch, still within day 4 safe window).
Halve eggs, season with sea salt and black pepper.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g). Plate and serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Strawberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: bowl of thick Greek yogurt with fresh halved strawberries and scattered walnut pieces, light background, overhead shot
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g) into bowl. Top with strawberries (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and walnuts (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g).

meals.name: Salmon & Quinoa Power Bowl with Roasted Broccoli, Carrots & Lemon-Mustard Drizzle
meals.image_prompt: overhead shot of a nourishing bowl with flaked baked salmon, fluffy quinoa, golden roasted broccoli florets and carrot coins, drizzled with a pale mustard dressing, cherry tomatoes on the side, bright daylight
day_of_steps: Cook quinoa: rinse 70 g (Diego) / 50 g (Diana), simmer in water 15 min. Drain and set aside.
Toss broccoli florets (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) and carrot coins (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) with 1 tsp olive oil, dried oregano, garlic powder. Roast in oven at 200°C for 18 min.
Season salmon fillets (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g) with garlic powder, black pepper, smoked paprika. Pan-sear in 1 tsp olive oil 3–4 min per side or until cooked through. Flake into chunks.
Make dressing: mix 1 tsp mustard + 1 tsp white wine vinegar + 1 tsp olive oil + pinch of sea salt.
Assemble bowl: quinoa first, then roasted veg, then salmon on top. Drizzle dressing over.
Serve with chickpeas on the side (Diego: 70 g drained, Diana: 50 g drained) and cherry tomatoes (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g).

ingredients.item: White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)
Dried oregano, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper
White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)
Dried oregano, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a shiny red apple next to a small dish of whole almonds on a neutral linen cloth, soft side light
day_of_steps: Rinse apple. Weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g, Diana: 15 g). Serve as is.

meals.name: Cumin Beef Stir-Fry with Zucchini, Bell Peppers & Brown Rice (cook fresh)
meals.image_prompt: sizzling stir-fried strips of seasoned beef with sliced zucchini and colourful bell peppers over brown rice in a white bowl, soy glaze glistening, warm evening kitchen light, overhead angle
day_of_steps: Cook brown rice (Diego: 70 g dry, Diana: 50 g dry) in boiling water 25 min. Drain.
Slice beef (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 120 g) into thin strips. Season with cumin, garlic powder, soy sauce, black pepper, pinch of ginger powder. Let sit while rice cooks.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok or large pan on high heat. Add beef strips, sear 3–4 min until browned. Remove beef.
Add 1 tsp sesame oil, stir-fry sliced zucchini (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) and bell peppers (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) 4 min.
Return beef to pan, add a splash of soy sauce, toss 1 min.
Plate rice, top with stir-fry. Serve with spinach salad (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g) tossed with a few drops of balsamic vinegar.

ingredients.item: Cumin, garlic powder, ginger powder, black pepper
Cumin, garlic powder, ginger powder, black pepper

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough with Feta
meals.image_prompt: tall glass of creamy blueberry-banana kefir smoothie beside golden fried eggs on sourdough toast topped with crumbled feta, banana slices scattered on wooden board, bright morning light
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana (60 g) and 80 g blueberries until smooth. Pour into glass.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan. Fry eggs (Diego: 3, Diana: 2) 2–3 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g). Plate eggs on toast.
Crumble feta on top (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g). Season with black pepper.

meals.name: Orange & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: peeled orange segments on a small plate next to a pile of walnut halves in soft morning light, white ceramic, overhead
day_of_steps: Peel and segment orange (1 per person). Weigh walnuts (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g). Serve.

meals.name: Mediterranean Beef & Vegetable Traybake with Chickpeas, Zucchini & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: overhead of a sheet pan with golden-roasted beef pieces, zucchini chunks, cherry tomatoes, chickpeas and potato wedges, seasoned with Mediterranean herbs, olive oil glistening, rustic baking tray, natural light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 210°C.
Cut potatoes (with skin) into wedges (Diego: 150 g, Diana: 100 g). Slice zucchini (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g).
On a large lined baking tray, spread potatoes, zucchini, cherry tomatoes (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and drained chickpeas (Diego: 70 g, Diana: 50 g).

Add beef chunks or beef mince (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 120 g). Season everything with dried oregano, dried thyme, smoked paprika, garlic powder, sea salt, black pepper. Drizzle 2 tsp olive oil (Diego) / 1 tsp (Diana) over all. Toss gently.
Roast 25–28 min, turning once halfway, until potatoes are golden and beef is cooked.
Serve directly from tray with spinach leaves underneath (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g).
Follow with 1/2 banana per person.

ingredients.item: Potatoes with skin (pommes de terre avec peau)
Dried oregano, dried thyme, smoked paprika, garlic powder, black pepper
Potatoes with skin (pommes de terre avec peau)
Dried oregano, dried thyme, smoked paprika, garlic powder, black pepper

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: creamy Greek yogurt in a small bowl topped with fresh blueberries and green pistachio kernels, clean white background, overhead, soft light
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g). Top with blueberries (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and pistachios (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g).

meals.name: Asian-Style Baked Tilapia with Sesame Broccoli, Carrots & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: baked tilapia fillet with a soy-ginger glaze on a white plate beside tender sesame-roasted broccoli florets and carrot coins over fluffy quinoa, lime wedge on side, moody evening light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Cook quinoa: rinse 60 g (Diego) / 45 g (Diana), simmer 15 min in water, drain.
Mix marinade: 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tsp sesame oil + pinch of ginger powder + pinch of garlic powder. Coat tilapia fillets (Diego: 170 g, Diana: 120 g) and place on lined tray.
Toss broccoli florets (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) and carrot coins (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) with 1 tsp sesame oil and garlic powder. Add to tray.
Bake everything 15–18 min until tilapia flakes easily.
Plate quinoa first, then broccoli and carrots, then tilapia on top. Add a squeeze of lime.
Serve with cucumber sticks (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) on the side.

ingredients.item: Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper
Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Orange & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: vibrant orange-blue layered kefir smoothie in a wide glass beside two golden fried eggs on thick sourdough toast, fresh orange slices on the plate, Saturday morning sunshine through window
day_of_steps: Blend 250 ml kefir with juice of 1 orange and 80 g blueberries until smooth. Pour into glass.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in non-stick pan. Fry eggs (Diego: 3, Diana: 2) 2–3 min.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g). Season eggs with black pepper. Serve.

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: crisp apple slices fanned out next to a small bowl of whole almonds on a linen cloth, overhead shot, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Slice apple. Weigh almonds (Diego: 25 g, Diana: 15 g). Serve.

meals.name: Mexican Salmon & Lentil Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Spinach & Corn Tortillas
meals.image_prompt: overhead Mexican-inspired bowl with cumin-spiced flaked salmon, green lentils, roasted bell peppers and dark spinach, two corn tortillas alongside, lime wedge, colourful ceramic bowl, bright natural daylight
day_of_steps: Season salmon fillets (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g) with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, black pepper and a squeeze of lime. Cook in 1 tsp olive oil in pan 4 min per side. Flake into chunks.
Warm drained lentils (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) in small pan with 1 tbsp tomato paste, pinch of cumin and splash of water, 3 min.
Slice and quickly pan-roast bell peppers (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) in 1 tsp olive oil with smoked paprika, 5 min.
Warm corn tortillas (Diego: 2, Diana: 2) in a dry pan.
Assemble bowl: spinach first (Diego: 60 g, Diana: 40 g), then lentils, then peppers, then salmon chunks.
Squeeze lime, serve tortillas on the side. Follow with 100 g strawberries each.

ingredients.item: Cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper
Cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, smoked paprika, black pepper

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Apple & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: thick Greek yogurt in a ceramic bowl topped with diced apple chunks and walnut pieces, afternoon natural light, wooden table
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g). Dice apple (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) and add on top. Finish with walnuts (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g).

meals.name: French-Herb Tilapia Traybake with Leeks, Zucchini & Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: golden roasted tilapia fillets on a tray with soft braised leeks, zucchini rounds and crispy potato chunks, herbs and olive oil glistening, white ceramic dish, warm Saturday evening light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Slice leek (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g), zucchini (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g), and cube potatoes with skin (Diego: 150 g, Diana: 100 g).
Spread vegetables on a lined tray. Drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil, season with dried thyme, dried oregano, garlic powder, sea salt, black pepper. Roast 15 min.
Add tilapia fillets (Diego: 170 g, Diana: 120 g) to tray. Brush with mixture of 1 tsp olive oil + white wine vinegar + garlic powder.
Return tray to oven for 13–15 min until tilapia flakes easily and potatoes are golden.
Serve directly from tray. Accompany with raw spinach salad (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g) with balsamic vinegar.
Add a side of cherry tomatoes (Diego: 60 g, Diana: 50 g).

ingredients.item: Potatoes with skin (pommes de terre avec peau)
White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)
Dried thyme, dried oregano, garlic powder, black pepper
Potatoes with skin (pommes de terre avec peau)
White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)
Dried thyme, dried oregano, garlic powder, black pepper

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Strawberries + Boiled Eggs on Sourdough with Feta
meals.image_prompt: large Sunday breakfast spread: glass of pink strawberry-banana kefir smoothie, two sliced hard-boiled eggs on thick sourdough with crumbled feta, whole fresh strawberries, bright window morning light, relaxed weekend feel
day_of_steps: Boil eggs (Diego: 2, Diana: 2) for 9 min. Transfer to cold water for 2 min. Peel and halve.
Blend 250 ml kefir with 1/2 banana (60 g) and 100 g strawberries until smooth.
Toast sourdough (Diego: 40 g, Diana: 30 g).
Plate halved eggs on toast, crumble feta (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g) on top. Season with black pepper.
Pour smoothie into glass and serve alongside.

meals.name: Apple & Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: sliced golden apple on a small plate beside shelled green pistachios in a ramekin, soft Sunday natural light
day_of_steps: Slice apple. Weigh pistachios (Diego: 25 g, Diana: 15 g). Serve.

meals.name: Smoky Beef & Lentil Stuffed Bell Peppers with Tomato Sauce & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: two large red bell peppers stuffed with smoky seasoned ground beef and green lentils in tomato sauce, served alongside fluffy quinoa on a white plate, overhead shot, bright Sunday afternoon light
day_of_steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Cook quinoa (Diego: 60 g dry, Diana: 45 g dry) in water 15 min. Drain.
Cut tops off bell peppers (Diego: 2 large peppers, Diana: 1 large + 1 small). Remove seeds.

Cook ground beef (Diego: 170 g, Diana: 115 g) in pan with garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, dried oregano 5 min. Add drained lentils (Diego: 70 g, Diana: 50 g) and 2 tbsp tomato paste + 50 ml water. Simmer 4 min.
Fill peppers with beef-lentil mixture. Place in baking dish, drizzle 1 tsp olive oil over each. Bake 18 min until peppers are tender.
Serve stuffed peppers alongside quinoa. Add spinach on the side (Diego: 60 g, Diana: 40 g) dressed with balsamic vinegar.
Finish with 80 g blueberries each.

ingredients.item: Garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, dried oregano, black pepper
Garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, dried oregano, black pepper

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Banana & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: Greek yogurt bowl with sliced banana rounds and scattered almond slivers, clean ceramic bowl on light wood surface, Sunday afternoon glow
day_of_steps: Spoon Greek yogurt (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g). Slice 1/3 banana each (40 g). Top with almonds (Diego: 20 g, Diana: 15 g).

meals.name: Ginger-Soy Salmon with Stir-Fried Broccoli, Leeks & Wholemeal Noodles
meals.image_prompt: Sunday dinner plate of soy-glazed salmon fillet on a bed of wholemeal noodles tossed with stir-fried broccoli florets and soft leek strips, ginger-sesame aroma, dark ceramic bowl, candlelit evening light
day_of_steps: Cook wholemeal noodles / spaghetti (Diego: 70 g dry, Diana: 50 g dry) in boiling salted water 10 min. Drain.
Mix glaze: 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tsp sesame oil + pinch ginger powder + pinch garlic powder.
Coat salmon (Diego: 180 g, Diana: 130 g) with half the glaze. Pan-sear in 1 tsp sesame oil, 4 min per side.
In same pan, stir-fry sliced leek (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and broccoli florets (Diego: 100 g, Diana: 80 g) with remaining glaze 4–5 min.
Toss drained noodles into vegetables. Plate noodle-veg mixture and lay salmon on top.
Add raw cucumber sticks on the side (Diego: 80 g, Diana: 60 g) and cherry tomatoes (Diego: 60 g, Diana: 50 g).

ingredients.item: Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper
Ginger powder, garlic powder, black pepper
